validation.title: Validation
validation.success: All rules are compatible – no conflicts or missing dependencies.
validation.checklist_sha: Compare the SHA-256 hash of the downloaded file with the value above.
validation.checklist_ansible: Run the Ansible playbook in --check mode on a test environment.
validation.checklist_bash: Review the Bash script with --dry-run on a test environment.
validation.checklist_gpo: Import the GPO backup to a test OU and verify.
validation.checklist_powershell: Run the PowerShell script in -WhatIf mode.
validation.checklist_verify: Verify each rule made the expected change.
validation.checklist_backup: Take a backup before applying to the production environment.
validation.checklist_audit: Run the audit script after applying to verify compliance.

validation.not_saved_hint: This artifact was not saved. To find it via the search panel, check 'Save & Share' and generate again.
